00005 #include "sprite/common.hpp"
00006 #include "sprite/exec.hpp"
00007 #include "sprite/node.hpp"
00008 #include <boost/mpl/has_xxx.hpp>
00009 
00010 namespace sprite
00011 {
00013   namespace manipulators
00014   {
00015     namespace detail
00016     {
00017       inline Program const * & pgm_data(std::ios_base & stream)
00018       {
00019         static int const index = std::ios::xalloc();
00020         return (Program const * &)(stream.pword(index));
00021       }
00022     }
00023 
00031     struct setprogram
00032     {
00033       setprogram(Program const & pgm) : m_pgm(pgm) {}
00034     private:
00035       Program const & m_pgm;
00036       void * m_prev;
00037     public:
00038       template<typename Stream>
00039       friend Stream & operator<<(Stream & stream, setprogram const & manip)
00040       {
00041         detail::pgm_data(stream) = &manip.m_pgm;
00042         return stream;
00043       }
00044     };
00045 
00047     inline std::ios_base & clearprogram(std::ios_base & stream)
00048     {
00049       detail::pgm_data(stream) = 0;
00050       return stream;
00051     }
00052   }
00053   using manipulators::setprogram;
00054   using manipulators::clearprogram;
00055 
00056   namespace meta
00057   {
00058     // Declare a metapredicate named has_value_type that tests for the
00059     // value_type nested typedef.
00060     BOOST_MPL_HAS_XXX_TRAIT_DEF(value_type);
00061   }
00062 
00063   namespace visitors
00064   {
00076     template<typename Stream>
00077     struct StreamOut : static_visitor<Stream &>
00078     {
00079       typedef typename StreamOut::result_type result_type;
00080       StreamOut() {}
00081 
00086       template<typename Payload>
00087       typename enable_if<meta::has_value_type<Payload>, result_type>::type
00088       operator()(Stream & stream, bool, Node_<Payload> const & node) const
00089         { return (stream << node.payload.value); }
00090 
00095       template<typename NodeType>
00096       result_type operator()(
00097           Stream & stream, bool first, NodeType const & node
00098         ) const
00099       {
00100         // Get the program associated with this stream.
00101         Program const * pgm = manipulators::detail::pgm_data(stream);
00102 
00103         bool need_close = false;
00104 
00105         // Print the label.
00106         if(pgm)
00107         {
00108           switch(node.tag())
00109           {
00110             case OPER:
00111                 if(!first && node.arity() > 0)
00112                 {
00113                   stream << "(";
00114                   need_close = true;
00115                 }
00116                 stream << pgm->oper_label[node.id()];
00117                 break;
00118             case CTOR:
00119                 if(!first && node.arity() > 0)
00120                 {
00121                   stream << "(";
00122                   need_close = true;
00123                 }
00124                 stream << pgm->ctor_label[node.id()];
00125                 break;
00126             case FAIL: stream << "**FAIL**"; break;
00127             case CHOICE:
00128               if(!first)
00129               {
00130                 stream << "(";
00131                 need_close = true;
00132               }
00133               stream << "?_" << node.id();
00134               break;
00135             default:
00136               throw RuntimeError("mishandled node in operator<<");
00137           }
00138         }
00139         else
00140         {
00141           if(!first)
00142           {
00143             stream << "(";
00144             need_close = true;
00145           }
00146           stream << "<unknown-ctor>";
00147         }
00148 
00149         // Print the children.
00150         BOOST_FOREACH(NodePtr const & child, node.iter())
00151         {
00152           stream << " ";
00153 
00154           visit(
00155               tr1::bind<Stream &>(*this, tr1::ref(stream), false, _1)
00156             , *child
00157             );
00158         }
00159 
00160         if(need_close) stream << ")";
00161         return stream;
00162       }
00163     };
00164   }
00165 
00166   namespace operators
00167   {
00169     template<typename Stream>
00170     Stream & operator<<(Stream & stream, Node const & node)
00171     {
00172       static visitors::StreamOut<Stream> const visitor;
00173       return visit(
00174           tr1::bind<Stream &>(visitor, tr1::ref(stream), true, _1), node
00175         );
00176     }
00177   }
00178   using operators::operator<<;
00179 }
